Studienprojekt Archiv

The repository of older versions of packages from the main demo repository.

Currently it serves 0 apps. To add it to your F-Droid app, scan the QR code (click it to enlarge) or use this link:

https://fl0777.github.io/studienprojekt-fdroid/archive

If you would like to manually verify the fingerprint (SHA-256) of the repository signing key, here it is:
C6 C7 9B 0D A9 CE B1 74 16 9A 5B 3A 91 6D 1C D9 87 A4 7A 7C F2 73 BB 25 36 FD 75 DD 28 E4 99 B0
